allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8888 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id $_OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } | Select-Object Id,ProcessName")

Bash(node -e "const http = require\(''http''\); http.get\(''http://localhost:8888/api/health'', r => { let d=''''; r.on\(''data'',c=>d+=c\); r.on\(''end'',\(\)=>console.log\(''Server OK:'', d\)\); }\).on\(''error'', e => console.log\(''Server DOWN:'', e.message\)\);")
Bash(python -c "import sys, json; [print\(p['name'], '::', p['pm2_env'].get\('pm_cwd',''\), '::', p['pm2_env'].get\('script',''\)\) for p in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(PGPASSWORD='NbiAi2026!SecureDb' psql -U nbiai -h localhost -d nbi_dashboard -c "SELECT tier, count\(*\) FROM news.sources GROUP BY tier ORDER BY tier")

Bash(awk -F: '{line=$1; if\(line<3000\) zone="HTML/head"; else if\(line<4000\) zone="Sidebar/Nav"; else if\(line<5000\) zone="Render/Dashboard"; else if\(line<6000\) zone="MyTasks/Tasks"; else if\(line<7000\) zone="Calendar/Gantt"; else if\(line<8000\) zone="Tree/Board/DnD"; else if\(line<9000\) zone="Detail/Blocked"; else if\(line<10000\) zone="People/Reports"; else if\(line<11000\) zone="Leads/Clients"; else if\(line<12000\) zone="Expenses"; else if\(line<13000\) zone="Leads2/Finance"; else if\(line<14000\) zone="Finance/BugTrack"; else if\(line<15000\) zone="Hiring/News"; else if\(line<16000\) zone="Settings/Import"; else zone="Rest"; counts[zone]++} END{for\(z in counts\) print counts[z], z}')

Bash(sed -i 's/\\.pf__milestone-item { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 10px; padding: 8px 0;/.pf__milestone-item { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 12px; padding: 10px 0;/' nbi_project_dashboard.html)

Bash(sed -i 's/\\.pf__milestone-item:hover { background: var\(--bg-hover\); margin: 0 -16px; padding: 8px 16px;/.pf__milestone-item:hover { background: var\(--bg-hover\); margin: 0 -16px; padding: 10px 16px;/' nbi_project_dashboard.html)
Bash(sed -i 's/\\.pf__milestone-bar { width: 3px; min-height: 36px;/.pf__milestone-bar { width: 4px; min-height: 44px;/' nbi_project_dashboard.html)
Bash(sed -i 's/\\.pf__milestone-title { font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 500;/.pf__milestone-title { font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 600;/' nbi_project_dashboard.html)
